element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Each character has distinct roles: hero deals melee damage, girl heals/supports, sprite casts offensive magic

element_introduction_order.element: Real-time combat with power bar mechanic
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Players learn timing by managing power bar gauge that empties on attack then recharges for full damage
Circular menu accessed mid-battle (pauses action) for equipment changes, spell casting, status checks

element_introduction_order.element: Weapon types (8 varieties: sword, spear, bow, axe, boomerang, glove, whip, javelin)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Repeated use increases skill level to 8, unlocking special attacks; upgraded via Weapon Orbs at blacksmiths
Eight elementals represent different elements (water, earth, life); each grants specific spell schools with magic points cost

element_introduction_order.element: Weapon Orbs and blacksmith upgrade system
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Found in dungeons or earned from bosses; forged at blacksmiths to upgrade weapons
Second/third player can drop in/out at any time using Super Multitap accessory; companions controlled by AI when not actively played
Collecting experience increases level; improves stats like strength and evasion

element_introduction_order.element: Towns with rest, healing, shopping, equipment changing
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Safe zones for recovering hit points, purchasing items, managing inventory
Launches party to distant destinations, expediting traversal of enemy-infested countryside

element_introduction_order.element: Dungeons with enemy encounters and loot
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Source of Weapon Orbs, items, and boss encounters
Defeated bosses drop orbs used to upgrade weapons; represent mandatory progression gates
Enables overworld flight for expanded map access and visual spectacle

typical_tension_triggers: Power bar timing pressure in combat
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Alternating safe exploration/town sequences with escalating combat difficulty in dungeons; real-time power bar creates micro-tension within battles; boss encounters serve as major tension peaks with orb-based progression gates

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Dungeons contain secrets and Weapon Orbs; overworld has optional exploration areas

difficulty_curve.early_game: Gentle introduction with basic real-time combat and single-element enemies; teaches power bar mechanic in low-stakes encounters
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalating enemy variety and boss difficulty; elemental weaknesses become important; introduction of special attacks and advanced magic
difficulty_curve.late_game: Complex boss mechanics; multiple elemental puzzles; all character abilities expected to be mastered; strategic party composition crucial
notable_spikes: Final confrontation with ancient flying fortress

notable_level_patterns.description: Safe town sequence (shopping, healing, preparation) followed by dungeon with enemies and boss serving as gate to next area
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Generic progression: town → overworld travel → dungeon → boss → new area unlock

notable_level_patterns.description: Series of parallel dungeon paths, each containing elemental boss that must be defeated to gain that element's magic school; non-linear sequencing allows player choice
Open countryside with enemy encounters and multiple traversal routes; Cannon Centers provide shortcuts for return journeys
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Inter-zone travel with optional exploring or optimized pathing

notable_level_patterns.description: Boss defeats unlock weapon upgrades; players incentivized to collect all orb types by trying all 8 weapon classes
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Each major boss acts as collection gate
